briefdescription.para: A left-to-right scroll bar.
A top-to-bottom scroll bar.
The supported scroll bar orientations.
The scroll bar orientation.
The total scrollable region.
The currently visible region.
Create a scroll bar with explicit layout metrics and orientation.
Get the total scrollable region.
Replace the total scrollable region.
Get the currently visible region.
Replace the currently visible region.
Test if this surface paints every cell in its rectangle.

simplesect.para: true if the surface is opaque.

briefdescription.para: Paint this surface into the target buffer.

parameterdescription.para: The paint context for the current paint pass.

briefdescription.para: Get the configured orientation.
Convert one std::size_t length into a coordinate with saturation.
Calculate the minimum rendered handle length for the given track length.

memberdef.argsstring: (HandleSpan span, Coordinate trackLength, Coordinate desiredLength) noexcept
memberdef.name: expandedHandleSpan

briefdescription.para: Expand one projected handle span to the required minimum length.
Normalize the configured scroll region into a finite range.

simplesect.para: The normalized scroll region, or an empty range if projection is not possible.

briefdescription.para: Clamp the visible region to the current scroll region.
Get the painted length along the main axis.

simplesect.para: The width for horizontal bars or height for vertical bars.

briefdescription.para: Project the visible region into the track.
Paint the scroll bar with the active theme.
Convert a projected handle span into a rectangle inside the themed track content area.
Shared base class for one-dimensional scroll bar surfaces.

detaileddescription.para: The scroll bar is a purely visual indicator for a visible region inside a larger scroll region.
